critical_issues.recommendation: Immediate action required to configure package manager proxies

critical_issues.description: github.com in GOPRIVATE bypasses Artifactory for all public Go modules

findings.issue: GOPRIVATE includes github.com - bypassing proxy for public modules
findings.recommended_action: Remove github.com from GOPRIVATE. Only include eos2git.cec.lab.emc.com

implementation: This will proxy public GitHub modules through Artifactory while keeping internal modules direct
recommendations.issue: GOPRIVATE includes github.com - bypassing Artifactory for public modules

recommendations.action: Configure package manager proxies in build pipeline
recommendations.issue: 1 package ecosystems not using Artifactory proxy

recommendations.action: Route all public dependencies through Artifactory
recommendations.impact: Missing benefits of caching, security scanning, and compliance tracking
implementation: Ensure all package managers are configured to use Artifactory virtual repositories
Update Jenkins shared library to set proxy environment variables
Add proxy configuration to Dockerfiles and Makefiles

reliability_metrics.recommendation: Low reliability. Only 0.0% of packages have configuration evidence. Enable Jenkins integration and build log analysis for better results.
